appraisal_events.evidence: « Ah ! les aristocrates, la Terreur a été bien coupable de ne pas leur couper le cou à tous. Ce sont tous de sinistres crapules quand ce ne sont pas tout simplement de sombres idiots. »
appraisal_events.explanation: Legrandin condemns aristocrats without nuance; since Robert de Saint-Loup is explicitly present as an aristocrat, this diatribe discredits him by association.

status_effects.explanation: Legrandin’s violent stigmatization of the aristocratic class locally lowers the esteem attached to Robert as a member of that class.
